_note: The ONLY place signal points and ageing live. Edit numbers here, never in code. Weights are opinion until outcome data exists; monthly-review cuts by source_signal will eventually set them. max_age_days is per signal type: hiring and new-in-role signals go stale in 90 days, but a gifting case study proves someone pays for physical outreach for much longer (24 months). Signals older than their window score zero but stay on the record. undated_requires_currency_check: vendors rarely date case studies, so an undated story's age is unknowable and the person must be confirmed still in the seat before approval - the first currency sweep found 14 of 24 named people had moved.
